## 📋 FOR HUMANS (What Happened)

**Primary Topic:** Fixed Page 3 (Letter of Transmittal) toggle functionality by adding missing data-sample attributes to all field-mapped spans

**What We Built:**
- Complete Page 3 with 20 data-sample attributes in `/Users/bencrowe/Development/APR-Dashboard-v3/docs/15-Contract-review/1-Formatting & Report/REPORT Pg Img/doc-page-html/doc-pages-html-formatted/PREVIEW-Master.html`
- Git commit 6fc7abf documenting all changes
- Template pattern for fixing remaining early pages (1-39)

**What We Discovered:**
- Early pages (before page 40) have field IDs but no data-sample attributes
- Toggle button relies on data-sample attribute to show sample data
- JavaScript swaps textContent between {{Field_ID}} and data-sample value
- SVG files contain extractable text but are too large to read directly
- PNG images provide visual confirmation of correct values
- Page 3 demonstrated that one property reference is sufficient (no cross-reference needed)

**What Changed:**
- **PREVIEW-Master.html Page 3 (lines 376-456):**
  - Before: `<span class="field-mapped" title="{{Company_Name}}">{{Company_Name}}</span>`
  - After: `<span class="field-mapped" data-sample="Valta Property Valuations Ltd." title="{{Company_Name}}">{{Company_Name}}</span>`
  - Applied to all 20 fields on the page

**Decisions Made:**
- **Decision:** Use single property reference (North Battleford) for Page 3
  - **Why:** Letter of Transmittal contains standard company/client info that doesn't need cross-property comparison
  - **Impact:** Faster implementation, pattern established for similar pages

- **Decision:** Extract data from PNG images rather than parsing SVG
  - **Why:** SVG files are 146K tokens (too large to read), PNG provides visual confirmation
  - **Impact:** More reliable data extraction, easier to verify correctness

- **Decision:** Add all 20 data-sample attributes in single commit
  - **Why:** Page 3 is a complete unit of work, easier to review as single change
  - **Impact:** Clean git history, easy to review/rollback if needed

## Technical Details

**Toggle Mechanism:**
```javascript
// When toggle is ON (checked):
document.querySelectorAll('.field-mapped').forEach(field => {
    const sampleValue = field.getAttribute('data-sample');
    field.setAttribute('data-original', field.textContent); // Store {{Field_ID}}
    field.textContent = sampleValue; // Show sample data
});

// When toggle is OFF (unchecked):
document.querySelectorAll('.field-mapped').forEach(field => {
    const originalText = field.getAttribute('data-original');
    field.textContent = originalText; // Restore {{Field_ID}}
});
```
